programs.title: The Nanny Sees All
programs.desc: Grace Anderson's new job as a nanny for the mayor's family turns into a nightmare when a murder rocks the town, and she starts receiving ominous messages. Now, Grace starts to question what deadly secrets are lurking in her hometown.

programs.title: Match, Meet, Murder
programs.desc: Diving into the world of dating apps, a lingerie designer meets a handsome stranger who's smart, successful, and a former contestant on a dating show. However, she soon learns that the show wasn't the only secret he failed to mention in his profile.

programs.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programs.desc: When bank employee Theodore Conrad casually walks off his job carrying hundreds of thousands of dollars in a paper bag, a fifty-two year manhunt ensues; two federal marshals and a father and son duo manage to close the case.

programs.title: Charmed to Death
programs.desc: A single father finally finds a love he can grow old with; but just months after they've wed, his retirement savings are depleted, and he learns he's only the latest in a string of victims; when he files for divorce, things get much worse.

programs.title: Targeted for Murder
programs.desc: In Pensacola, Florida, ex-cop and private investigator, Taylor Wright, is moving into a new home with the love of her life when she inexplicably disappears without a trace; it appears at first as if she may have simply run away.

programs.title: Threats from the Inside
programs.desc: Brad Collins' love for his wife, Amy, becomes an all-encompassing obsession, and he grows more and more controlling of her with each passing year. When Brad finds out that Amy had an affair with a colleague, a huge fight ensues and tragedy results.
